name: case_name_present
expression: case_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(case_name)) > 0
description: case_name is required for Litigation Case File extraction.

name: case_status_present
expression: case_status IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(case_status)) > 0
description: case_status is required for Litigation Case File extraction.

name: exposure_amount_non_negative
description: exposure_amount should be non-negative when present.
